# yp (YitPush) — Full Documentation Bundle

Version: 2.0.0 | Command: `yp` | Language: C# / .NET 10

---

## INSTALL

```bash
dotnet tool install -g YitPush
yp setup        # configure AI provider interactively
```

Update:
```bash
dotnet tool update -g YitPush
```

---

## SETUP

Run `yp setup` to configure your AI provider. The wizard will:
1. Let you pick a provider: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, DeepSeek, OpenRouter
2. Enter your API key (masked)
3. Select a model from a curated list or enter a custom one
4. Validate the key with a test call
5. Optionally add the `yitpush` alias to your shell config
6. Save config to `~/.yitpush/config.json`

### Config file format (~/.yitpush/config.json)
```json
{
  "defaultProvider": "Anthropic",
  "providers": {
    "Anthropic": {
      "apiKey": "sk-ant-...",
      "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6",
      "isActive": true
    },
    "OpenAI": {
      "apiKey": "sk-...",
      "model": "gpt-4o",
      "isActive": false
    },
    "OpenRouter": {
      "apiKey": "sk-or-...",
      "model": "google/gemini-2.0-flash-exp:free",
      "isActive": false,
      "baseUrl": "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions"
    }
  }
}
```

### Environment variable overrides (backward compatible)
```bash
export DEEPSEEK_API_KEY='...'     # used if no config file exists
export OPENAI_API_KEY='...'       # overrides stored key for OpenAI
export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY='...'    # overrides stored key for Anthropic
export GOOGLE_API_KEY='...'       # overrides stored key for Google
export OPENROUTER_API_KEY='...'   # overrides stored key for OpenRouter
```

---

## COMMANDS

### yp commit

Stage all changes, generate an AI commit message, and push.

```
yp commit [--confirm] [--detailed] [--language <lang>] [--save]
```

| Flag | Short | Description |
|------|-------|-------------|
| `--confirm` | | Ask for confirmation before committing |
| `--detailed` | | Generate commit with title + body |
| `--language <lang>` | `--lang`, `-l` | Output language (default: english) |
| `--save` | | Save commit message to a .md file |

Examples:
```bash
yp commit
yp commit --confirm
yp commit --detailed
yp commit -l spanish
yp commit --detailed -l french --save
```

### yp pr

Interactively select two branches, generate a PR description and copy to clipboard.

```
yp pr [--detailed] [--language <lang>] [--save]
```

| Flag | Short | Description |
|------|-------|-------------|
| `--detailed` | | Detailed description with testing notes and file list |
| `--language <lang>` | `--lang`, `-l` | Output language (default: english) |
| `--save` | | Save to pr-description-<from>-to-<to>.md |

Examples:
```bash
yp pr
yp pr --detailed
yp pr -l spanish
yp pr --detailed --save
```

### yp checkout

Interactive branch selector with search and back navigation.

```bash
yp checkout
```

### yp setup

Configure AI provider interactively.

```bash
yp setup
```

Reconfigures even if a provider is already set (asks for confirmation).

### yp azure-devops

Manage Azure DevOps resources. Can be run interactively (no args) or with subcommands.

```
yp azure-devops [subcommand] [args] [flags]
```

#### Subcommands

| Subcommand | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `repo new` | Create a new repository |
| `repo checkout` | Clone a repository interactively |
| `variable-group list` | List variable groups |
| `hu task [<org> <proj> <hu-id>]` | Create tasks for a User Story |
| `hu show [<org> <hu-id>]` | Show User Story details |
| `hu list [<org> <proj> <hu-id>]` | List tasks of a User Story |
| `hu link [<org> <proj> <hu-id>]` | Link a branch to a User Story |
| `task show [<org> <id>]` | Show task details |
| `task update [<org> <id>]` | Update task fields |
| `link [<org> <proj> <wi-id>]` | Add a link to a work item |

#### task update flags

| Flag | Short | Description |
|------|-------|-------------|
| `--effort <val>` | `-e` | Set Effort (HH) |
| `--effort-real <val>` | `-er` | Set Esfuerzo Real HH |
| `--remaining <val>` | `-r` | Set Remaining Work |
| `--state <val>` | `-s` | Set state (To Do, Doing, Done, ...) |
| `--comment <val>` | `-c` | Add a comment |

#### hu link / hu task flags

| Flag | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `--repo <name>` | Repository name |
| `--branch <name>` | Branch name |
| `--description <text>` | Task description |
| `--effort <val>` | Effort estimate |

Examples:
```bash
yp azure-devops hu show MyOrg 12345
yp azure-devops hu list MyOrg MyProj 12345
yp azure-devops task update MyOrg 67890 --state "Doing" --effort-real "3"
yp azure-devops task update MyOrg 67890 --comment "Fixed the issue"
yp azure-devops hu link MyOrg MyProj 12345 --repo MyRepo --branch feature/abc
yp azure-devops hu task MyOrg MyProj 12345 --description "Backend task" --effort "4"
```

---

## PROVIDERS

| Provider | Models | Auth header |
|----------|--------|-------------|
| OpenAI | gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini, o1, o1-mini | Bearer |
| Anthropic | claude-opus-4-6, claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-haiku-4-5 | x-api-key |
| Google Gemini | gemini-2.0-flash, gemini-1.5-pro | query param |
| DeepSeek | deepseek-chat, deepseek-reasoner | Bearer |
| OpenRouter | 100+ models | Bearer + HTTP-Referer |

---

## PROJECT STRUCTURE

```
YitPush/
├── Program.cs                      # Main entry point, routing, ShowHelp, version check
├── Models.cs                       # Data models (AppConfig, ProviderConfig, etc.)
├── Commands/
│   ├── CommitCommand.cs            # yp commit
│   ├── PrCommand.cs                # yp pr
│   ├── SetupCommand.cs             # yp setup + alias installation
│   └── CheckoutCommand.cs          # yp checkout
├── Providers/
│   └── AiProviders.cs              # ConfigManager + all AI provider HTTP calls
├── Git/
│   └── GitHelpers.cs               # All git operations
└── AzureDevOps/
    ├── AzureDevOpsCommand.cs       # Routing + interactive menu + help
    └── AzureDevOpsHelpers.cs       # All Azure REST API calls and logic
```

---

## VERSION CHECK

On every run, `yp` silently checks NuGet for a newer version (cached for 24h in `~/.yitpush/version-check.json`). If a newer version is found, a notice is shown after the command output.

---

## TROUBLESHOOTING

**No AI provider configured**
Run `yp setup` or set `DEEPSEEK_API_KEY` env var.

**Not a git repository**
Run from inside a git repo.

**API key invalid**
Re-run `yp setup` and enter the correct key.

**git push failed**
Ensure a remote is configured and credentials are valid.
